## Summary

- Describe the change and the user-facing or engineering outcome.

## Validation

- [ ] `corepack pnpm commit:check`
- [ ] Cross-repo impact reviewed when contracts or bundle metadata changed

## Open Source Checks

- [ ] No secrets, env files, generated artifacts, or `.private-*` content were committed
- [ ] New source in this PR is intended to ship under `MPL-2.0`
- [ ] README or supporting docs were updated when repo-facing behavior changed
